mapper.select: SELECT * FROM approval_instance WHERE resource_id = #{resourceId} ORDER BY submit_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT ai.resource_id AS resourceId, COALESCE(oq.name, c.name, so.name, ci.name, '') AS resourceName, UPPER(ai.type) AS resourceType, u.name AS applicant, ai.submit_time AS submitTime, CASE WHEN at.action IS NULL OR at.action = '' THEN at.status ELSE at.action END AS approvalOperation, ai.approval_status AS dataResult, at.id AS approvalTaskId, at.node_id AS approvalNodeId, at.instance_id AS approvalInstanceId, at.approver_id AS approvalId, afv.flow_id AS approvalFlowId, afv.id AS approvalFlowVersionId FROM approval_task at INNER JOIN approval_instance ai ON ai.id = at.instance_id INNER JOIN approval_flow_version afv ON afv.id = ai.flow_version_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = ai.submitter_id LEFT JOIN opportunity_quotation oq ON ai.resource_id = oq.id AND ai.type IN ('quotation', 'quote') LEFT JOIN contract c ON ai.resource_id = c.id AND ai.type = 'contract' LEFT JOIN sales_order so ON ai.resource_id = so.id AND ai.type = 'order' LEFT JOIN contract_invoice ci ON ai.resource_id = ci.id AND ai.type = 'invoice' WHERE at.approver_id = #{approverId} AND at.status = #{pendingStatus} AND at.type != 'CC' AND ai.approval_status not in ('APPROVED','UNAPPROVED')
AND ai.type = #{resourceType}
AND COALESCE(oq.name, c.name, so.name, ci.name) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{resourceName}, '%')
ORDER BY at.create_time DESC, at.id DESC

SELECT ai.resource_id AS resourceId, COALESCE(oq.name, c.name, so.name, ci.name, '') AS resourceName, UPPER(ai.type) AS resourceType, u.name AS applicant, ai.submit_time AS submitTime, CASE WHEN at.action IS NULL OR at.action = '' THEN at.status ELSE at.action END AS approvalOperation, ai.approval_status AS dataResult, at.id AS approvalTaskId, at.node_id AS approvalNodeId, at.instance_id AS approvalInstanceId, at.approver_id AS approvalId, afv.flow_id AS approvalFlowId, afv.id AS approvalFlowVersionId FROM approval_task at INNER JOIN approval_instance ai ON ai.id = at.instance_id INNER JOIN approval_flow_version afv ON afv.id = ai.flow_version_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = ai.submitter_id LEFT JOIN opportunity_quotation oq ON ai.resource_id = oq.id AND ai.type IN ('quotation', 'quote') LEFT JOIN contract c ON ai.resource_id = c.id AND ai.type = 'contract' LEFT JOIN sales_order so ON ai.resource_id = so.id AND ai.type = 'order' LEFT JOIN contract_invoice ci ON ai.resource_id = ci.id AND ai.type = 'invoice' WHERE at.approver_id = #{approverId} AND at.status NOT IN ('APPROVING','NONE','REVOKED') AND at.action IS NOT NULL
AND ai.type = #{resourceType}
AND COALESCE(oq.name, c.name, so.name, ci.name) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY at.update_time DESC, at.id DESC

SELECT ai.resource_id AS resourceId, COALESCE(oq.name, c.name, so.name, ci.name, '') AS resourceName, UPPER(ai.type) AS resourceType, u.name AS applicant, ai.submit_time AS submitTime, CASE WHEN at.action IS NULL OR at.action = '' THEN at.status ELSE at.action END AS approvalOperation, ai.approval_status AS dataResult, at.id AS approvalTaskId, at.node_id AS approvalNodeId, at.instance_id AS approvalInstanceId, at.approver_id AS approvalId, afv.flow_id AS approvalFlowId, afv.id AS approvalFlowVersionId FROM approval_task at INNER JOIN approval_instance ai ON ai.id = at.instance_id INNER JOIN approval_flow_version afv ON afv.id = ai.flow_version_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = ai.submitter_id LEFT JOIN opportunity_quotation oq ON ai.resource_id = oq.id AND ai.type IN ('quotation', 'quote') LEFT JOIN contract c ON ai.resource_id = c.id AND ai.type = 'contract' LEFT JOIN sales_order so ON ai.resource_id = so.id AND ai.type = 'order' LEFT JOIN contract_invoice ci ON ai.resource_id = ci.id AND ai.type = 'invoice' WHERE at.approver_id = #{approverId} AND at.type IN ('cc', 'CC')
AND ai.type = #{resourceType}
AND COALESCE(oq.name, c.name, so.name, ci.name) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY at.update_time DESC, at.id DESC

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(t.cnt), 0) AS total, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN t.type IN ('quotation', 'quote') THEN t.cnt ELSE 0 END), 0) AS quotation, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'contract' THEN t.cnt ELSE 0 END), 0) AS contract, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'order' THEN t.cnt ELSE 0 END), 0) AS `order`, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'invoice' THEN t.cnt ELSE 0 END), 0) AS invoice FROM (SELECT ai.type AS type, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM (SELECT DISTINCT at.instance_id FROM approval_task at INNER JOIN approval_instance ai ON ai.id = at.instance_id INNER JOIN approval_flow_version afv ON afv.id = ai.flow_version_id WHERE at.approver_id = #{approverId} AND at.status = #{pendingStatus} AND ai.approval_status not in ('APPROVED' , 'UNAPPROVED') AND ai.current_node_id = at.node_id) pending INNER JOIN approval_instance ai ON ai.id = pending.instance_id GROUP BY ai.type) t
mapper.update:
update approval_task
node_id = #{approvalTask.nodeId},
instance_id = #{approvalTask.instanceId},
approver_id = #{approvalTask.approverId},
status = #{approvalTask.status},
type = #{approvalTask.type},
action = #{approvalTask.action},
create_time = #{approvalTask.createTime},
update_time = #{approvalTask.updateTime},
create_user = #{approvalTask.createUser},
update_user = #{approvalTask.updateUser},
id = #{approvalTask.id}
update approval_task set approver_id = #{approverId}, update_time = UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000
